title: Software Engineer I

**What we would like from you:**

* Excellent communication and collaboration skills..

 You will define the quality gates across the SDLC and champion "shift\\-left" testing practices. By seamlessly integrating your automation into CI/CD pipelines with DevOps, you will empower the engineering org to ship code faster without breaking things.

 You will look beyond functional testing to lead performance, cross\\-browser, and non\\-functional testing initiatives. Using deep debugging skills in distributed systems, you will proactively identify bottlenecks before they reach the user.

 As a technical leader across multiple QA pods, you will elevate the engineering standards of everyone around you. Through rigorous test code reviews, architectural guidance, and dedicated mentorship, you will build a culture where quality is truly in the engineering DNA.

* Define quality gates across SDLC and drive shift\\-left testing practices.
* Lead performance, non\\-functional, and cross\\-browser testing initiatives.

* Provide technical leadership across multiple QA pods.

**Core Engineering \\& Architecture**



* **7–9 years** 
 of proven experience in QA engineering and advanced automation.
* Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* **Data Structures \\& Algorithms (DSA):** 
 Strong analytical problem\\-solving skills, capable of writing optimized code (time/space complexity) and applying OOP principles for highly extensible automation.
* **System Design for Test:** 
 Experience architecting reusable automation frameworks from scratch for distributed systems and microservices.
* **Engineering Mindset:** 
 A hands\\-on builder who codes and tests at production\\-level standards and naturally biases toward excellent documentation.



**Automation \\& Tooling Stack**



* **UI \\& API Automation:** 
 Deep expertise in Selenium (Webdrivers, XPath, CSS Selectors), Postman, and API testing methodologies.
* **Performance Testing:** 
 Hands\\-on experience with JMeter or similar load\\-testing tools to validate non\\-functional requirements.
* **DevOps Integration:** 
 Strong experience embedding test strategies into CI/CD pipelines and partnering directly with Dev/DevOps teams.



**Testing Methodologies \\& Leadership**



* **End\\-to\\-End STLC:** 
 Deep understanding of the Software Testing Life Cycle, Test Management, Test Coverage, and complex release processes (including comprehensive manual testing when needed).

 Advanced debugging and defect analysis skills within highly complex, scalable environments.

 A proven track record of mentoring junior engineers, leading code reviews, and clearly articulating complex architectural thought processes to cross\\-functional stakeholders.

We seek to deliver the high quality experience our customers demand from the time any customer opens Prime Video until the end of each customer’s live event playback experience. We seek to create insights, tooling, and mechanisms to close existing gaps, identify new gaps as they appear, and remediate as quickly as possible.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Prime Video is rapidly creating new experiences by bringing the biggest live events to our global base of customers. Our teams are known for building the future of how people watch movies and TV shows, and with our recent launches of NFL Thursday Night Football, MLB TV, NBA league pass, ATP Tennis, and many more, we are bringing our innovation to Live events around the world.
   

  

 We are looking for smart, motivated Software Development Engineer who can help in building our platform for delivering live video events to our customer. If you have experience building large\\-scale, high\\-performance, customer\\-centric products and are interested in designing multi\\-tier services to handle large datasets, complex domains, and problems at Amazon scale, this is the job for you.
   

  

 Our innovative systems include high efficient and large scale platforms built on Amazon's AWS cloud computing infrastructure. For this position you will have a strong background in OO design with Java/C\\+\\+. Experience working with web services, XML, JSON, and GraphQL is desired. Linux system development experience is a plus. Equally important to these specific skills is the ability to multi\\-task, quickly adapt to new development environments and changing business requirements, learn new systems, create reliable/maintainable code, and find creative and scalable solutions to difficult problems.

You see your mistakes as learning opportunities and continually look for ways to improve yourself, your team and your products. You understand that not all solutions come easily and don’t shy away from hard work to reach your goals. You are excited about the opportunity to engage in developing a top notch consumer web application and user experience.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 You will be building tools and services that work horizontally across Prime Video Sports to ensure high customer availability. This will include identification of gaps and the tools to plug those gaps, including full\\-stack software design and development. You will collaborate with other engineers and managers to design services which meet key business needs and scale to the size of Prime Video data. You will prioritize data\\-driven decision making, taking initiative to collect data and derive insights supporting engineering design decisions.

title: Quality Assurance Associate
description:
Role: Quality Assurance Associate
   

  

 Employment Type: Full Time
   

  

 Educational Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience)
   

  

 Work Experience: 2\\-5 years of hands\\-on experience in both manual and automated testing in a B2B
   

  

**Role Description**
 At Pixxel, It’s not enough for us to just dump satellite images down from satellites to users. It’s important that we equip the end users with the tools they’d need to work with this imagery and any other data to derive insights in a seamless manner on a single platform without any hassle. Towards that goal, we are building “Aurora” \\- an all\\-inclusive platform for a wide range of tasks within the remote sensing and geospatial analytics domain.
   

  

 The Aurora platform will offer a seamless user experience, empowering individuals and organizations to accomplish various tasks, from requesting satellite imagery across specific regions to importing and analyzing diverse datasets using advanced analytics and machine learning models to obtain valuable insights, alerts, and recommendations. Furthermore, the platform will facilitate tracking actions based on recommendations and monitor their impact.
   

  

 As a Quality Assurance Associate for Aurora, you will own manual testing and automation of testing of the complete Aurora platform.
   

  

 In this role, you will be working cross\\-functionally with Pixxel's Product Team, Engineering Team (Software Engineers, Cloud Engineers), Machine Learning Engineers and Geospatial Analysts.
   

  

**Responsibilities \\& Duties**
* Manual \\& Automated Testing (50/50 split): Conduct thorough manual and automated testing of new features, enhancements, and bug fixes to ensure high\\-quality releases. Ensure every new feature is tested in the staging environment first and perform thorough testing of the production environment also.
* Test Planning \\& Strategy: Design, develop, and execute comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scenarios across all features of the Aurora platform, ensuring both functional and performance testing are covered.
* Collaboration with Cross\\-Functional Teams: Work closely with product managers, software engineers, and designers to understand requirements, refine user stories, and validate acceptance criteria.
* Agile Processes \\& Sprint Execution: Actively participate in agile ceremonies such as sprint planning and daily stand\\-ups, driving testing efforts for feature releases.
* Regression Testing \\& Bug Tracking: Perform regression testing to ensure feature stability, document bugs clearly, and work closely with developers to resolve issues promptly.
* Ensure adherence of User Interface with the Figma Designs created by designers: Have attention to detail and ensure 100% match between the user interface developed and the figma designs created by designers. In case of any mismatch between product requirement, design and developed feature, raise the bugs to the development team.
* Test Automation: Develop, maintain, and enhance automated test frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Cypress) to ensure efficient regression and integration testing.
* Reporting \\& Documentation: Create detailed test documentation, reports, and metrics to track progress and performance. Contribute to product documentation by writing user manuals, FAQs, and technical guides.
* Continuous Improvement: Proactively suggest improvements to the QA process, testing tools, and frameworks to drive quality and speed in product releases.
* End\\-to\\-End Ownership: Ensure end\\-to\\-end product quality by thoroughly testing key product features like data analytics, satellite imagery processing, and L2A hyperspectral image workflows.
* Production Monitoring: Support post\\-release activities by monitoring production environments for issues, collaborating with DevOps and engineering teams on troubleshooting.


**Desirable Skills \\& Certifications**
* SaaS environment. Familiarity with geospatial analytics, AI, ML, or hyperspectral imaging would be a plus.
* Testing Tools: Proficiency with test automation frameworks such as Selenium, JUnit, Cypress, and experience with manual testing tools like JIRA, TestRail, etc.
* API Testing: Experience testing APIs using Postman or similar tools.
* Technical Skills: Solid understanding of SQL (PostgreSQL), scripting (Python/Java), and backend systems for validating data and functionality.
* CI/CD \\& DevOps Knowledge: Basic understanding of CI/CD pipelines and integration of testing within continuous delivery workflows.
* Agile Experience: Familiarity with agile testing methodologies, sprint cycles, and ability to work within fast\\-paced, iterative environments.
* Problem Solving \\& Attention to Detail: Ability to diagnose and troubleshoot complex issues with a meticulous approach to identifying defects.
* Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to collaborate effectively with cross\\-functional teams and document detailed reports.


**Nice To Have**
* Cloud Infrastructure: Exposure to AWS or other cloud environments, including experience with testing cloud\\-native applications.
* Performance Testing: Knowledge of performance testing tools like JMeter or LoadRunner and experience in identifying bottlenecks.
* Certifications: ISTQB certification or similar testing credentials like CSTE, CSQA, CAST, CMSQ are advantageous but not mandatory.


**Candidate Acumen**
 Strong customer empathy with a focus on delivering quality, attention to detail, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Health insurance coverage
   

  

 Unlimited leaves \\& flexible working hours
   

  

 Role\\-based remote work and work\\-from\\-home benefit
   

  

 Relocation assistance
   

  

 Professional Mental Wellness services
   

  

 Creche facility for primary caregivers (limited to India)
   

  

 Employee Stock Options for all hires
   

  

**About Pixxel**
 Pixxel is a space data company, building a constellation of hyperspectral earth imaging satellites and the analytical tools to mine insights from that data. Pixxel’s constellation is designed to provide global coverage every 24 hours and help detect, monitor, and predict global phenomena across agriculture, mining, environment and energy use cases.
   

  

 Pixxel is on a mission to build a health monitor for the planet through a constellation of cutting\\-edge hyperspectral small satellites. This unique hyperspectral capability will be the key to unearth underlying, unseen problems that are invisible to satellites in orbit today.
   

  

 Pixxel has collaborated with prominent organizations such as the Indian Space Research Organization, NASA JPL, and SpaceX among other leaders in the space industry. The organization is backed by Lightspeed, Radical Ventures, Relativity's Jordan Noone, Seraphim Capital, Ryan Johnson, Blume Ventures, Sparta LLC and Accenture among others.
   

  

 Recently, Pixxel successfully raised $36 Million in its Series B funding round, with participation from new investors like Google, alongside existing investors, bringing the company's total venture funding to $71 Million.
   

  

 To know more about us, visit https://www.pixxel.space.
   

  

 Culture
   

  

 Pixxel is an organisation where we enable our employees to work on world\\-changing problems that they are passionate about, and a place where they can be their best selves day in and day out while ensuring they have fun every day.
   

  

 Central to our employee\\-first ethos is a commitment to ensuring that every team member feels valued and heard. We nurture a healthy and supportive work environment where we prioritise well\\-being and growth in all aspects of life

title: ROR Engineer
description:
Job Title: Software Engineer (RoR)
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a Software Engineer (Platform), you will be responsible for developing, optimizing, and maintaining platform components and services, working primarily with Ruby on Rails. You will also have the opportunity to work with Elixir, Kafka, SQL, and other cutting\\-edge technologies. The ideal candidate will have a strong Ruby on Rails background, be familiar with platform engineering practices, and enjoy collaborating across teams to deliver robust, scalable systems.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Platform Development: Design and build backend services and platform features using Ruby on Rails as the primary framework.
* System Architecture: Collaborate with engineering teams to define and implement scalable and maintainable systems architecture.
* API Design: Develop and maintain RESTful or GraphQL APIs that support front\\-end and third\\-party integrations.
* Database Management: Work with relational databases (SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL) to design data models, write complex queries, and optimize database performance.
* Message Queuing \\& Event Streaming: Work with Kafka for event\\-driven architecture and message queuing to ensure system reliability and scalability.
* Caching: Implement caching strategies using tools like Redis to optimize performance and reduce latency.
* Performance \\& Scalability: Optimize platform services for performance, scalability, and reliability, particularly for large\\-scale data handling.
* Code Quality \\& Testing: Follow best practices for clean, maintainable code, and write automated tests to ensure system reliability.
* Collaboration: Work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including frontend developers (React/Typescript), DevOps, and product teams, to deliver high\\-quality, user\\-friendly features.
* Continuous Improvement: Stay up\\-to\\-date with new technologies, industry trends, and best practices to continuously improve the platform.


**Required Skills \\& Qualifications**
* Strong experience with Ruby and Ruby on Rails (primary focus).
* Proficiency in SQL and experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL).
* Experience working with Kafka for building event\\-driven architectures and handling messaging queues.
* Strong understanding of API design (RESTful, GraphQL) and integration with various systems.
* Nice to have a Familiarity with backend caching techniques using Redis.
* Ability to write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices and design patterns.
* Experience with version control systems like Git.
* Knowledge of testing frameworks and practices (e.g., RSpec, Minitest).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.
* Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Elixir experience or willingness to learn.
* Familiarity with React and TypeScript for full\\-stack development.
* Experience with Docker and containerization.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment practices.
* Familiarity with Agile methodologies and project management tools.


**Why Join Us**
* Be part of a dynamic, innovative team working on cutting\\-edge technologies.
* Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Flexible work hours and remote work options.

description:

 At Celigo, we believe integration should empower — not exhaust — innovation.  Join a team of highly talented individuals committed to offering the best quality products in the area of business cloud computing (SaaS). **Required Experience**
 We are looking for someone that absolutely loves to write code. **All Candidates Applying Should Have**

+ Apache Kafka

 All candidates applying must have the following characteristics:

* Fast learner – ability to step in and develop working knowledge of a technology in a less than average amount of time
* Self\\-starter – motivation, work ethic and ambition to distinguish one’s self are key
* Genuine Interest in Technology – desire to be on the cutting edge of cloud\\-based technologies.
* Enjoy the start\\-up atmosphere and are flexible with shifting priorities.
* Think big and bring new ideas to the table—regardless of rank or title.
* Bring ambition, a proactive mindset and the ability to inspire others.
* Strive for results—always.


**Celigo is proud to be**

**Here You’ll Experience**
* A flexible, hybrid work culture that values autonomy, collaboration, and trust
* A fast\\-paced, high\\-growth environment where innovation and ownership are encouraged at every level
* Continuous learning and upskilling opportunities through internal training, mentorship, and global collaboration
* Exceptional teammates who bring passion, purpose, and creativity to everything they do
* A supportive, inclusive workplace that celebrates diverse ideas and perspectives
* Comprehensive health insurance coverage for employees and dependents
* Generous leave benefits, including paid time off, wellness days, and parental leave
* Recognition programs and career growth opportunities designed to help you thrive
* Modern office spaces that promote connection, collaboration, and fun.


**Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility**
 As a company, one of the values we hold most dear is fostering a safe, collaborative environment to bring out the best in us, so we created our Taking a Stand Initiative. Our TAS initiative is a volunteer committee open to all Celigans, with representation from underrepresented voices within our company. We believe, unequivocally, that everyone deserves to be in a place where they feel welcome as they are. Learn more about Taking a Stand.
   

  

 Celigo is proud to be an equal\\-opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, creed, age, disability, sex, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, military and veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements.

title: Software Development Engineer II, Alexa 3P Experiences
description:
**Description**
 Alexa\\+ is Amazon's next\\-generation personal assistant powered by generative AI – more conversational, smarter, personalized, and built to get things done on any device.
   

  

 The Alexa 3P Experiences team is on a mission to expand what Alexa\\+ can do for customers by building consumer\\-facing experiences with trusted third\\-party partners like Uber, Ticketmaster, Yelp, and more. Using frontier AI technologies – including Large Language Models (LLMs), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Agent\\-to\\-Agent (A2A) capabilities – we create agentic experiences that connect customers with an ever\\-expanding selection of services through natural conversation.
   

  

 As an SDE II on this team, you will design and build category\\-defining experiences that millions of customers interact with daily. You will work closely with product, design, and partner teams to deliver high\\-quality, scalable solutions that drive customer discovery, engagement, task completion, and monetization. You will contribute to category scaling frameworks – reusable components that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort.
   

  

 We're a team that moves fast, builds with AI\\-native technologies, and measures success by customer impact. If you want to work at the intersection of generative AI and consumer experiences, this is the place.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 – Building high\\-quality, consumer\\-facing 3P experiences and Agentic Experts that enable customers to complete tasks through trusted partners on Alexa\\+.
   

  

 – Designing and developing components for category scaling frameworks that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort.
   

  

 – Collaborating closely with product, design, and partner teams to deliver experiences that drive customer discovery, engagement, and task completion.
   

  

 – Understanding the business impact of your systems and showing good judgment when making technical trade\\-offs between speed of delivery and long\\-term scalability.
   

  

 – Driving engineering best practices (e.g., Operational Excellence, Security, Quality) within the team.
   

  

 – Contributing to the professional development of colleagues by sharing knowledge, participating in code reviews, and improving engineering practices.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 A typical day will start with a morning huddle to catch up on what you and your team worked on the previous day. This is usually followed by some whiteboard design discussions on the problems the team is working on. The afternoon is mostly spent on project design and implementation work with a heavy dose of code reviews from and for your team along the way. We are a fun, close\\-knit team where everyone is ready to roll up their sleeves and help each other out, push boundaries, and have fun doing it!
   

  

**About The Team**
 Alexa 3P Experiences is a dedicated organization within Alexa Domains, purpose\\-built to rapidly expand the choices and selection of agentic experiences on Alexa\\+. Building on early launches with marquee partners, our mission is to offer customers choice and expanded selection in Alexa's agentic capabilities – positioning Alexa to lead in the next generation of ambient AI interactions. We work closely with cross\\-functional teams across Alexa for core platform capabilities while owning the end\\-to\\-end consumer experience and category innovation.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience
* 2\\+ years of non\\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent

If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\\-we\\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

description:
**Description**
 Alexa\\+ is Amazon's next\\-generation personal assistant powered by generative AI – more conversational, smarter, personalized, and built to get things done on any device.
   

  

 The Alexa 3P Experiences team is on a mission to expand what Alexa\\+ can do for customers by building consumer\\-facing experiences with trusted third\\-party partners like Uber, Ticketmaster, Yelp, and more. Using frontier AI technologies – including Large Language Models (LLMs), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Agent\\-to\\-Agent (A2A) capabilities – we create agentic experiences that connect customers with an ever\\-expanding selection of services through natural conversation.
   

  

 As an SDE II on this team, you will design and build category\\-defining experiences that millions of customers interact with daily. You will work closely with product, design, and partner teams to deliver high\\-quality, scalable solutions that drive customer discovery, engagement, task completion, and monetization. You will contribute to category scaling frameworks – reusable components that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort.
   

  

 We're a team that moves fast, builds with AI\\-native technologies, and measures success by customer impact. If you want to work at the intersection of generative AI and consumer experiences, this is the place.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 – Building high\\-quality, consumer\\-facing 3P experiences and Agentic Experts that enable customers to complete tasks through trusted partners on Alexa\\+.
   

  

 – Designing and developing components for category scaling frameworks that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort.
   

  

 – Collaborating closely with product, design, and partner teams to deliver experiences that drive customer discovery, engagement, and task completion.
   

  

 – Understanding the business impact of your systems and showing good judgment when making technical trade\\-offs between speed of delivery and long\\-term scalability.
   

  

 – Driving engineering best practices (e.g., Operational Excellence, Security, Quality) within the team.
   

  

 – Contributing to the professional development of colleagues by sharing knowledge, participating in code reviews, and improving engineering practices.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 A typical day will start with a morning huddle to catch up on what you and your team worked on the previous day. This is usually followed by some whiteboard design discussions on the problems the team is working on. The afternoon is mostly spent on project design and implementation work with a heavy dose of code reviews from and for your team along the way. We are a fun, close\\-knit team where everyone is ready to roll up their sleeves and help each other out, push boundaries, and have fun doing it!
   

  

**About The Team**
 Alexa 3P Experiences is a dedicated organization within Alexa Domains, purpose\\-built to rapidly expand the choices and selection of agentic experiences on Alexa\\+. Building on early launches with marquee partners, our mission is to offer customers choice and expanded selection in Alexa's agentic capabilities – positioning Alexa to lead in the next generation of ambient AI interactions. We work closely with cross\\-functional teams across Alexa for core platform capabilities while owning the end\\-to\\-end consumer experience and category innovation.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience
* 2\\+ years of non\\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\\-we\\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \\- ADCI \\- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A3197742

**(\\*Note: This is a requirement for one of Uplers' client \\- AI\\-driven fintech platform)
   

  

**What do you need for this opportunity?
   

  

**Must have skills required:**

**AI\\-driven fintech platform is Looking for:**
**LLM Engineer******
**WHO WE ARE:**
 A fintech platform backed by industry leaders including JP Morgan, Morningstar, Broadridge,
   

  

 Hamilton Lane, Franklin Templeton, Motive Partners, and a who’s who of the financial service industry.
   

  

 We are creating engaging wealth experiences to better financial lives through AI and investment
   

  

 intelligence\\-powered personalization. We are working to change the world of wealth in ways that
   

  

 personalization has changed the world of movies, music, and more, but with the added responsibility of
   

  

 delivering better wealth outcomes.
   

  

**OUR VALUES: Go with your GUT**
* Grow at the Edge. We are driven by personal growth. We get out of our comfort zone and keep egos


 aside to find our genius zones. With self\\-awareness and integrity we strive to be the best we can
   

  

 possibly be. No excuses.
   

  

* Understanding through Listening and Speaking the Truth. We value transparency. We communicate


 with radical candor, authenticity and precision to create a shared understanding. We challenge, but
   

  

 once a decision is made, commit fully.
   

  

* I Win for Teamwin. We believe in staying within our genius zones to succeed and we take full


 ownership of our work. We inspire each other with our energy and attitude. We fly in formation to win
   

  

 together.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Work closely with the design and product teams to help craft conversational experiences for


 our users
   

  

* Ability to work independently to deliver features that the team design
* You need to own outcomes without someone watching over you
* Understand the data we have and identify how we could leverage it to create more


 personalised experiences for our users
   

  

* Fine\\-tune models with data specific to our use case
* Use different RAG approaches to augment data that the LLM already has
* Ability to be a leader and independent contributor (we’re a startup, so be ready to do whatever it takes)
* Setup new workflow, systems and tool from the ground up (you will have support, but we’re


 building things from scratch)
   

  

**Requirements:**
* 3\\+ years of experience
* Experience working with LLMs and Generative AI
* Experience building conversational bots
* Experience fine tuning models
* Experience using RAG base approaches
* Understanding of financial concepts and investing would be a big plus but not required


**BENEFITS PACKAGE:**
**Offers a competitive benefits package thatincludes:**
* Performance Linked variable compensation.
* Medical insurance
* Tax\\-saving benefits
* Flexible PTO policy and Company\\-paid holidays
* Parental Leave: 6 months paid maternity,
* 2 weeks paid paternity Leave


**How to apply for this opportunity?**
* Step 1: Click On Apply! And Register or Login on our portal.
* Step 2: Complete the Screening Form \\& Upload updated Resume
* Step 3: Increase your chances to get shortlisted \\& meet the client for the Interview!


**About Uplers:**
 Our goal is to make hiring reliable, simple, and fast. Our role will be to help all our talents find and apply for relevant contractual onsite opportunities and progress in their career. We will support any grievances or challenges you may face during the engagement.

 So, if you are ready for a new challenge, a great work environment, and an opportunity to take your career to the next level, don't hesitate to apply today. We are waiting for you!

title: Senior Integrations Engineer [T500-24077]
description:
**About Stolt\\-Nielsen:** 




 Stolt\\-Nielsen is a family\\-founded global leader in bulk\\-liquid and chemical logistics, transportation, and storage, known for its commitment to safety, service excellence, and innovation. At the Stolt\\-Nielsen Digital Innovation Centre, we bring this legacy into the future — building smarter systems, driving digital transformation, and shaping what's next for the world of logistics. Here, you’re encouraged to think boldly, challenge convention, and help move today’s products toward tomorrow’s possibilities.
 



 We are excited to announce an opening for a
 **Senior Integration Engineer** 
 at Stolt\\-Nielsen Digital Innovation Centre. Please find below the details of the role and its responsibilities.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 As a Senior Integration Engineer at Stolt\\-Nielsen, you will play a critical role in designing and building the integration architecture that connects our business applications, trading partners and operational systems. Across our businesses, we are actively modernising our integration landscape to support our growing logistics operations — connecting ERP systems, vessel planning tools, port agents, customers, and external partners through reliable B2B and application\\-to\\-application messaging.
 



 A large part of the role involves B2B integrations in the logistics domain: working with EDI standards such as EDIFACT and X12, designing scalable partner onboarding processes, and ensuring reliable, high\\-volume document exchange (e.g., booking confirmations, bills of lading, invoices, voyage instructions). You will also architect event\\-driven integrations between our internal applications using Azure Integration Services, setting patterns that the wider team follows.
 



 You will be part of a global business\\-led product team that operates with a DevOps mentality. It is a collaborative, diverse, fast\\-paced environment. The role is hands\\-on but also requires you to take ownership of architectural decisions, guide junior engineers, and ensure solutions are aligned with Stolt\\-Nielsen’s business and technical goals.
 



 At Stolt\\-Nielsen, we take Digital seriously. We invest in our teams through training and mentoring and enable them with the required tools to work in a modern way (engineer laptop, Cursor license). As we are further building up our engineering practice, there is ample room for you to contribute, take initiative and shape the future of our ways of working and technology landscape.
 



  





**What You’ll Do:** 



* Lead the design and development of integrations using Azure Integration Services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, API Management, Functions, Event Hub, Integration Accounts).
* Architect and build B2B integration solutions with external partners using EDI standards (EDIFACT, X12\\) and protocols (AS2, SFTP), handling high\\-volume and business\\-critical message flows.
* Design event\\-driven, inter\\-application integration patterns (publish/subscribe, choreography, saga) and establish standards that the team follows.
* Define and manage API strategies (REST, SOAP) for internal and external consumption via Azure API Management, including versioning, policies, and security.
* Contribute to the overall integration architecture and strategy, making decisions on patterns, tooling, and platform capabilities.
* Guide and mentor junior integration developers through code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing.
* Design scalable partner onboarding processes: schema and map management, agreement configuration, and trading partner lifecycle management.
* Troubleshoot complex integration issues across the platform; perform root cause analysis and drive permanent fixes.
* Collaborate with DevOps engineers to ensure robust CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code for integration deployments.
* Document integration architecture, patterns, and decisions; maintain runbooks and operational documentation.
* Perform additional duties and strategic projects as assigned.



  





**What You’ll Bring:** 



* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, or a related field.
* 5\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in integration development and architecture.
* Proven experience working in the logistics, shipping, or supply chain industry.
* Deep expertise in Azure Integration Services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Functions, Integration Accounts, Event Hub).
* Strong experience with B2B/EDI standards (EDIFACT, X12\\) and communication protocols (AS2, SFTP) in a production environment.
* Proficiency in SQL and at least one programming language (C\\#, Python or similar).
* Solid understanding of event\\-driven architecture, messaging patterns (pub/sub, queues, topics, sagas) and distributed systems.
* Experience designing and managing APIs at scale (Azure API Management or similar).
* Hands\\-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code (Terraform, Bicep, or ARM).
* Strong analytical thinking, architectural mindset, and collaborative problem\\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and documentation abilities.



  





**Must Have Skills:** 



* Azure Integration Services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Functions, Integration Accounts, Event Hub, API Management)
* B2B / EDI (EDIFACT, X12, AS2\\) in a logistics or supply chain context
* Event\\-driven architecture and messaging patterns
* SQL and C\\# or Python
* Git and CI/CD / Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code (we use Azure DevOps)



  





**Nice to Have Skills:** 



* Experience with Azure Event Grid and advanced event routing
* Knowledge of BizTalk Server or other legacy integration platforms (for migration projects)
* Experience with API governance, developer portal management, and API monetisation concepts
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Log Analytics)
* Experience with Terraform or Bicep for infrastructure provisioning
* Exposure to integration patterns in maritime or bulk logistics specifically

title: Mgr, App Development
description:
**This job is with Standard Chartered Bank, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ\\+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.** 
****Job Summary****
* We are seeking an experienced and technically strong developers for the initiatives within our Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT) Centre of Excellence. This role involves end\\-to\\-end development of innovative, high\\-impact projects involving blockchain infrastructure, digital assets, and enterprise\\-grade integrations. The ideal candidate will bring a balance of deep technical expertise skills to drive product delivery across emerging technologies and regulated environments.
* The candidate must be a skilled professional who has E2E software development experience with a desire to work on an agile, dynamic and flat organisational structure. Must have hands\\-on experience in building applications to manage client journey and experience. They will be matured individuals who are comfortable working in an agile environment with critical peer reviews of design and code. They must be able to offer constructive critical reviews of other's designs and code. They will be able to research, trial, and recommend new technologies of interest to the group. They will have experience with taking code through testing, deployment, and production.


****Key Responsibilities****
**Strategy**
* Blockchain Platforms: Hands\\-on experience with permissioned blockchain frameworks such as Quorum, Hyperledger Besu, Hyperledger Fabric, and Corda, including provisioning, configuration, and orchestration.
* DLT Use Cases: Demonstrated understanding of DLT applications such as Real World Asset (RWA) tokenization, Cross\\-Border Payments, Decentralized Identity (DID), and smart contract\\-based financial products.
* Software Engineering: Strong proficiency in backend development using Python or Golang, Solidity, RESTful API design, and microservice architectures.
* DevOps \\& Deployment: Experience with containerization and orchestration using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm. Proven track record deploying systems on AWS EKS or Azure AKS using CI/CD pipelines.
* Cryptography \\& Security: Knowledge of cryptographic primitives including public/private key infrastructure, symmetric/asymmetric encryption, digital signatures, and secure key management.
* System Integration: Ability to collaborate across platform, security, network, and compliance teams to ensure seamless integration of DLT services into enterprise ecosystems.
* Cloud \\& Infrastructure: Familiarity with AWS and/or Azure networking, access controls, high\\-availability setups, and infrastructure automation.


**Business**
* Build \\& maintain blockchain protocols, smart contracts, tokenization modules and consensus algorithms.
* Ensure security, integrity, and scalability of blockchain solutions.
* Stay updated with emerging trends and technologies in blockchain and cryptocurrency.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues in blockchain applications and systems.
* Suggest blockchain development processes and best practices.
* Perform code reviews to ensure code quality, maintainability, security, scalability, and adherence to coding standards.


**Processes**
* Solution Governance: Experience working with solution architects and security domain experts to design and implement systems compliant with internal controls, frameworks, and best practices.
* Standards \\& Methodologies: Proficiency in SDLC practices, Agile delivery, Git\\-based version control, issue tracking systems, and technical documentation.


**People \\& Talent**
* Leadership: Proven ability to work with cross\\-functional teams (Dev, DevOps, QA) through the full delivery lifecycle from ideation to implementation.
* Stakeholder Management: Comfortable interacting with business users, compliance, security, and external partners, aligning technical goals with business outcomes.
* Problem Solving: Adept at navigating ambiguity and delivering creative, robust solutions under tight deadlines and evolving requirements.
* Communication: Clear and persuasive communicator able to translate complex technical ideas into actionable insights for diverse audiences.
* Results\\-Driven: Strong track record of meeting delivery milestones while upholding code quality and security standards.
* Ability to coach and support junior engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning.


**Risk Management**
* The ability to interpret and align all responsible applications under the Groups technology and security framework, identify key issues based and put in place appropriate controls and measure.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters. Promote and embed a culture of openness, trust and risk awareness where ethical, legal, regulatory and policy complaint conduct is the norm


**Governance**
* Awareness and understanding of the regulatory framework, around infrastructure hosting and data management for client facing applications, and the regulatory requirements and expectations for the Bank. Ensure application design considerations are taken based on this.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters. Promote and embed a culture of openness, trust and risk awareness where ethical, legal, regulatory and policy complaint conduct is the norm.


**Regulatory \\& Business Conduct**
* Display exemplary conduct and live by the Group's Values and Code of Conduct.
* Take personal responsibility for embedding the highest standards of ethics, including regulatory and business conduct, across Standard Chartered Bank. This includes understanding and ensuring compliance with, in letter and spirit, all applicable laws, regulations, guidelines and the Group Code of Conduct.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters.


**Skills And Experience**
* Strong proficiency in backend development using Python or Golang, Solidity, RESTful API design, and microservice architectures
* DLT Use Cases: Demonstrated understanding of DLT applications such as Real World Asset (RWA) tokenization, Cross\\-Border Payments, Decentralized Identity (DID), and smart contract\\-based financial products.
* DevOps \\& Deployment: Experience with containerization and orchestration using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm. Proven track record deploying systems on AWS EKS or Azure AKS using CI/CD pipelines.
* Cryptography \\& Security: Knowledge of cryptographic primitives including public/private key infrastructure, symmetric/asymmetric encryption, digital signatures, and secure key management.
* Blockchain Platforms: Hands\\-on experience with permissioned blockchain frameworks such as Quorum, Hyperledger Besu, Hyperledger Fabric, and Corda, including provisioning, configuration, and orchestration.


**Qualifications**
* Masters or Engineering background


**About Standard Chartered**
 We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. We question the status quo, love a challenge and enjoy finding new opportunities to grow and do better than before. If you're looking for a career with purpose and you want to work for a bank making a difference, we want to hear from you. You can count on us to celebrate your unique talents and we can't wait to see the talents you can bring us.
   

  

 Our purpose, to drive commerce and prosperity through our unique diversity, together with our brand promise, to be here for good are achieved by how we each live our valued behaviours. When you work with us, you'll see how we value difference and advocate inclusion.
   

  

**Together We**
* Do the right thing and are assertive, challenge one another, and live with integrity, while putting the client at the heart of what we do
* Never settle, continuously striving to improve and innovate, keeping things simple and learning from doing well, and not so well
* Are better together, we can be ourselves, be inclusive, see more good in others, and work collectively to build for the long term


****What we offer****
**In line with our Fair Pay Charter,** 
 we offer a competitive salary and benefits to support your mental, physical, financial and social wellbeing.
   

  

* Core bank funding for retirement savings, medical and life insurance, with flexible and voluntary benefits available in some locations.
* Time\\-off including annual leave, parental/maternity (20 weeks), sabbatical (12 months maximum) and volunteering leave (3 days), along with minimum global standards for annual and public holiday, which is combined to 30 days minimum.
* Flexible working options based around home and office locations, with flexible working patterns.
* Proactive wellbeing support through Unmind, a market\\-leading digital wellbeing platform, development courses for resilience and other human skills, global Employee Assistance Programme, sick leave, mental health first\\-aiders and all sorts of self\\-help toolkits
* A continuous learning culture to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.
* Being part of an inclusive and values driven organisation, one that embraces and celebrates our unique diversity, across our teams, business functions and geographies \\- everyone feels respected and can realise their full potential.

description:
**Description**

 The Alexa 3P Experiences team is on a mission to expand what Alexa\\+ can do for customers by building consumer\\-facing experiences with trusted third\\-party partners like Uber, Ticketmaster, Yelp, and more. Using frontier AI technologies – including Large Language Models (LLMs), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and Agent\\-to\\-Agent (A2A) capabilities – we create agentic experiences that connect customers with an ever\\-expanding selection of services through natural conversation.
   

  

 As a Senior SDE on this team, you will lead the design and architecture of category\\-defining experiences and category\\-scaling SDKs – reusable frameworks that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort. You will take a long\\-term view of system architecture, drive engineering best practices, and make technical trade\\-offs that balance speed of delivery with scalability and operational excellence. You will mentor engineers, influence technical direction across the org, and work directly with product, design, and partner teams to shape how millions of customers discover and interact with 3P services on Alexa\\+.
   

  

 We're a team that moves fast, builds with AI\\-native technologies, and measures success by customer impact. If you want to lead at the intersection of generative AI and consumer experiences, this is the place.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 – Leading the design and architecture of consumer\\-facing 3P experiences and agentic Experts that enable customers to complete tasks through trusted partners on Alexa\\+
   

  

 – Owning the technical vision and architecture for category scaling frameworks that enable partners to build sophisticated experiences with minimal effort
   

  

 – Taking a long\\-term view of system architecture, proactively identifying deficiencies and proposing larger initiatives to improve scalability and reliability
   

  

 – Making sound technical trade\\-offs that balance speed of delivery with operational excellence, security, and long\\-term maintainability
   

  

 – Driving engineering best practices and setting standards across the team and broader org
   

  

 – When confronted with discordant views, finding the best path forward and building consensus across engineering, product, and partner teams
   

  

 – Mentoring and developing engineers, raising the technical bar and improving engineering practices across the organization
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 A typical day might start with a design review where you're guiding the team through architectural trade\\-offs for a new category experience. You'll spend time mentoring engineers, unblocking technical challenges, and driving alignment with product and partner teams. The afternoon is a mix of deep technical work – writing code, reviewing CRs, and prototyping solutions – balanced with strategic thinking on how to scale the team's systems and processes. We are a fun, close\\-knit team where everyone is ready to roll up their sleeves and help each other out, push boundaries, and have fun doing it!
   

  

**About The Team**
 Alexa 3P Experiences is a dedicated organization within Alexa Domains, purpose\\-built to rapidly expand the choices and selection of agentic experiences on Alexa\\+. Building on early launches with marquee partners, our mission is to offer customers choice and expanded selection in Alexa's agentic capabilities – positioning Alexa to lead in the next generation of ambient AI interactions. We work closely with cross\\-functional teams across Alexa for core platform capabilities while owning the end\\-to\\-end consumer experience and category innovation.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience
* 5\\+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience
* 5\\+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent

**Nice to Have**
* Experience testing analytics or data\\-intensive applications

* High\\-trust, no\\-politics culture where ownership and accountability are core to how we work
